architecture.summary: Additive SSE events: comparison endpoint emits assertion_result + case_complete alongside outputs_ready + comparison_scored. No new services.

integrations.summary: N/A - all changes within vskill repo, no external integrations

ui-ux.summary: Split-lane two-column timeline (Skill|Baseline), merged spanning card for comparisons, dual-line MiniTrend sparkline (blue skill / gray baseline), empty column shows No baseline runs text

performance.summary: N/A - derive baselinePassRate from existing rubric scores, no additional LLM calls

security.summary: N/A - no auth/data changes, internal eval tool only

edge-cases.summary: Always show two-column layout even with one side empty. Exclude non-core types (improve, instruct, etc.) from sparkline.
